title: Dudu N Girlie - Cot Bed Sheets 140 x 70 Fitted - Jersey Cotton Hypoallergenic Cot Bed Bedding Fully Elasticated Skirt Breathable Easy Care - (Single Pack, Cream)
features: These ultra-soft fitted sheets are made from 100% natural cotton, breathable and gentle on your baby’s skin, designed to fit most standard cot beds (140 × 70 cm, 15 cm depth), and produced in OEKO-TEX certified facilities for safety and quality.
These 140 × 70 cm breathable cotton fitted sheets feature smart stretch-fit technology to stay securely in place, providing a safe, comfortable, and snug sleep surface for your baby.
These toddler bed sheets are made from 100% breathable, absorbent natural cotton, promoting airflow and comfort for your child while providing a soft, safe, and durable sleep surface.
These 140 × 70 cm fitted cot sheets are made from soft, breathable cotton jersey, free from harmful chemicals and pesticides, providing a gentle, comfortable, and safe sleep surface for your baby.

These fitted sheets are available in multiple sizes—Moses Basket, Crib, Mini Cot, Space Saver Cot, Travel Cot, Next to Me Crib, Single, Double, King, and Super King—and in a variety of colors including White, Grey, Pink, Blue, Cream, Yellow, Lilac, Black, and Navy to suit any nursery or bedroom.
description: Product Description Dudu n girlie cot bed fitted sheet is made from cotton for comfort with a slight stretch for easy fitting to your baby’s mattress. soft, stretchy jersey cotton fabric is kind next to your baby’s delicate skin. the fabric is light weight and very soft and is a very good alternative to regular cotton sheet which are woven. the stitches are small, even and very consistent producing a jersey cotton, that has a flat, smooth face with a slightly texture feel. measures 70 cm length by 140 cm width. available in white colour. Box Contains 1 x 100 Percent Cotton Baby Cot Bed Fitted Sheet
